testcase.name: Actualizar la informacion de un usuario

error.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//label[text()='Username']/../following-sibling::div/input"} (Session info: chrome=149.0.7827.115) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.29.0', revision: '5fc1ec94cb' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '24.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [b7db89ad97d51d898089edb4d65fb0f1, findElement {using=xpath, value=//label[text()='Username']/../following-sibling::div/input}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.115, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.114 (5be7af702aa..., userDataDir: C:\Users\danny\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:55046}, goog:processID: 20272, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:55046/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.115, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: b7db89ad97d51d898089edb4d65fb0f1
